mdSummary:
# AspectRatio

Constrains child content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/aspect-ratio

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AspectRatio | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The content (typically an image or video) constrained to the given Ratio, absolutely positioned to fill the box. |
| AspectRatio | Ratio | `double` | `1` | The width-to-height ratio (e.g. 16.0/9) the box is padded to maintain. Default 1 (square). Non-finite or non-positive values fall back to 1:1. |
| AspectRatio | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the inner content wrapper. |
| AspectRatio | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the outer padding-box element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (AspectRatio) — The content (typically an image or video) constrained to the given Ratio, absolutely positioned to fill the box.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AspectRatio />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/AspectRatio/AspectRatio.razor`
